jobs.title: Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Kulm Hotel), St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us: Do you thrive on crystal-clear processes, impeccable hygiene, and teamwork at a 5-star superior level? Become the driving force behind our culinary experiences and ensure flawless operations in the back-of-house. Your Responsibilities: Shift & Duty Planning across multiple outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, external events) – you orchestrate seamless operations from mise-en-place to breakdown. Leadership & Coaching of the Stewarding Team: daily briefings, clear standards, motivating presence – and when the pressure is on, you lead by working hands-on. Hygiene & Quality Assurance at the highest level (HACCP-compliant): inspections, documentation, and training to guarantee spotless standards. Dishwashing & Equipment Management: efficient use of modern facilities, care and maintenance, acting as a key link between kitchen, service, and events. Inventory & Cost Control: keeping track of stock, chemicals, and consumables; ensuring efficient processes without downtime. Event Excellence: logistics for large-scale functions, setting up return stations, and managing swift turnarounds. | This is you: Experience in luxury hospitality/catering within Stewarding or Back-of-House – ideally in a supervisory or assistant managerial role. Practical mindset & overview: you make smart decisions, remain calm in peak times, and take ownership. Leadership & communication skills. Hands-on mentality: proactive, solution-oriented, and a role model for cleanliness, order, and efficiency. Solid knowledge of hygiene & technology: HACCP expertise, familiarity with cleaning technology, and confidence with planning/office tools. Flexibility: willingness to work shifts, weekends, and support events – you enjoy the pulse of a lively luxury property. Languages: Portuguese or Italian as well as English. | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Grigioni). Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. # Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Si prospera su processi cristallini, igiene impeccabile e lavoro di squadra a livello superiore a 5 stelle? Diventa la forza trainante dietro le nostre esperienze culinarie e garantire operazioni impeccabile nel back-of-house. Le tue responsabilità: Shift & Duty Pianificazione attraverso più punti vendita (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, eventi esterni) – si orchestrano operazioni senza soluzione di continuità da mise-en-place a ripartizione. Leadership & Coaching del Team Stewarding: briefing giornalieri, standard chiari, presenza motivante – e quando la pressione è attiva, si guida lavorando hands-on. Igiene e qualità Assicurazione al più alto livello (HACCP-conforme): ispezioni, documentazione e formazione per garantire standard puliti. Dishwashing & Equipment Management: uso efficiente di strutture moderne, cura e manutenzione, agendo come un collegamento chiave tra cucina, servizio e eventi. Inventory & Cost Control: tenere traccia di stock, prodotti chimici e materiali di consumo; garantire processi efficienti senza tempi di fermo. Eccellenza Evento: logistica per funzioni su larga scala, installazione di stazioni di ritorno e gestione di giri rapidi. # Questo è l'esperienza nella ospitalità di lusso / categoria all'interno di Stewarding o Back-of-House – idealmente in un ruolo di supervisione o assistente manageriale. Pratico mindset & panoramica: si prendono decisioni intelligenti, rimanere calmi nei tempi di punta, e prendere la proprietà. Leadership & capacità di comunicazione. mentalità a mano: proattiva, orientata alla soluzione, e un modello di ruolo per la pulizia, l'ordine e l'efficienza. Conoscenza solida dell'igiene e della tecnologia: competenza HACCP, familiarità con la tecnologia di pulizia, e fiducia con gli strumenti di pianificazione / ufficio. Flessibilità: disponibilità a turni di lavoro, fine settimana e eventi di supporto – si gode il polso di una vivace proprietà di lusso. Lingue: portoghese o italiano e inglese. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Office Employee - Steward (inizia subito) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è quello che ti trasferisci con noiStiamo cercando un supporto energetico per il nostro moderno ristorante personale, Capricorn, che è stato recentemente costruito poco meno di un anno fa. Sei il cuore delle nostre operazioni dietro le quinte, assicurando non solo la pulizia impeccabile, ma anche sostenere attivamente il nostro team di cucina con preparazioni culinarie. I vostri compiti: cucina Supporto: Si assiste attivamente con il lavoro di preparazione (mise-en-place), come il taglio professionale di verdure e altri compiti preparatori. Ordine e pulizia: Garantisci una pulizia impeccabile e l'organizzazione nella nostra cucina moderna così come nell'ufficio posteriore del ristorante Capricorn. Attenzione: Siete responsabili per la pulizia, la cura e lo stoccaggio preciso di porcellana, vetreria, posate e utensili da cucina (pot e pentole). Coordinamento e Organizzazione: Si lavora a stretto contatto con i team di cucina e servizio per garantire operazioni fluide — anche durante ore di punta occupato. Questa è l'esperienza professionale: Porti una solida esperienza nel settore della gastronomia, idealmente da un ambiente hotel a 4 o 5 stelle. Interesse a Culinary Arti: Vi piace la gestione di ingredienti freschi e sono felici di sostenere il team con la preparazione di cibo. Competenze linguistiche: Si comunica con fiducia in tedesco, inglese o italiano. Personalità: Sei caratterizzato da flessibilità e la capacità di lavorare bene in un team. Apprezzi un ambiente dinamico e goditi il lavoro in un team motivato. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Office Employee - Steward (inizia subito) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. descriptionByLocale.en: Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. ## This is what you move with us Do you thrive on crystal-clear processes, impeccable hygiene, and teamwork at a 5-star superior level? Become the driving force behind our culinary experiences and ensure flawless operations in the back-of-house. Your Responsibilities: Shift & Duty Planning across multiple outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, external events) – you orchestrate seamless operations from mise-en-place to breakdown. Leadership & Coaching of the Stewarding Team: daily briefings, clear standards, motivating presence – and when the pressure is on, you lead by working hands-on. Hygiene & Quality Assurance at the highest level (HACCP-compliant): inspections, documentation, and training to guarantee spotless standards. Dishwashing & Equipment Management: efficient use of modern facilities, care and maintenance, acting as a key link between kitchen, service, and events. Inventory & Cost Control: keeping track of stock, chemicals, and consumables; ensuring efficient processes without downtime. Event Excellence: logistics for large-scale functions, setting up return stations, and managing swift turnarounds. ## This is you Experience in luxury hospitality/catering within Stewarding or Back-of-House – ideally in a supervisory or assistant managerial role. Practical mindset & overview: you make smart decisions, remain calm in peak times, and take ownership. Leadership & communication skills. Hands-on mentality: proactive, solution-oriented, and a role model for cleanliness, order, and efficiency. Solid knowledge of hygiene & technology: HACCP expertise, familiarity with cleaning technology, and confidence with planning/office tools. Flexibility: willingness to work shifts, weekends, and support events – you enjoy the pulse of a lively luxury property. Languages: Portuguese or Italian as well as English. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. Apply now ## Office Employee/Steward - Staff Restaurant "Capricorn" (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours. This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usCleanliness and Organization: You will ensure impeccable cleanliness and order in our high-end kitchen and the restaurant's back office.Careful Handling: You will be responsible for the precise handling, cleaning, and storage of porcelain, silverware, glassware, and blackware.Coordination and Organization: Ensure smooth operations through efficient organization and coordination of daily tasks.Start: immediate This is youHospitality Experience: You bring solid experience from the hospitality industry, ideally in a high-demand environment.Language Skills: German or English or ItalianFlexibility and Team Spirit: Your ability to adapt to changing requirements and work effectively within a dynamic team is a key strength.Start: per immediate wanted, until ca. 06.04. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usIn this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%). This is youFoundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application! BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.
descriptionByLocale.de: Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Saisonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. oder Dies ist, was Sie mit uns bewegen Beleben Sie kristallklare Prozesse, einwandfreie Hygiene und Teamarbeit auf einem 5-Sterne-Superior-Level? Werden Sie die treibende Kraft hinter unseren kulinarischen Erlebnissen und sorgen Sie für einwandfreie Operationen im Hinterhaus. Ihre Aufgaben: Schicht & Duty Planung über mehrere Steckdosen (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Bankette, externe Veranstaltungen) – Sie orchestrieren nahtlose Operationen von mise-en-place bis Breakdown. Leadership & Coaching des Stewarding Teams: tägliche Briefings, klare Standards, motivierende Präsenz – und wenn der Druck an ist, führen Sie durch arbeitende Hand-on. Hygiene und Qualität Sicherheit auf höchstem Niveau (HACCP-konform): Inspektionen, Dokumentationen und Schulungen, um makellose Standards zu gewährleisten. Dishwashing & Equipment Management: effiziente Nutzung moderner Einrichtungen, Pflege und Wartung, fungieren als zentrale Verbindung zwischen Küche, Service und Veranstaltungen. Bestands- und Kostenkontrolle: Bestands-, Chemikalien- und Verbrauchsmaterialien aufrechtzuerhalten; effiziente Prozesse ohne Ausfallzeiten zu gewährleisten. Event Excellence: Logistik für große Funktionen, Einrichtung von Rücksendern und Verwaltung von schnellen Umrundungen. oder Hier erfahren Sie luxuriös Gastfreundschaft/Verpflegung in Stewarding oder Back-of-House – ideal in einer Aufsichts- oder Assistenz-Managerrolle. Praktische Denkweise & Übersicht: Sie treffen intelligente Entscheidungen, bleiben ruhig in Spitzenzeiten und nehmen Eigentum. Führungs- und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. Hands-on Mentalität: proaktiv, lösungsorientiert und ein Vorbild für Sauberkeit, Ordnung und Effizienz. Solides Wissen über Hygiene & Technologie: HACCP-Know-how, Vertrautheit mit Reinigungstechnik und Vertrauen mit Planungs-/Bürowerkzeugen. Flexibilität: Arbeitsbereitschaft, Wochenenden und Support-Events – Sie genießen den Puls einer lebendigen Luxusimmobilie. Sprachen: Portugiesisch oder Italienisch sowie Englisch. Vorteile Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, erschwingliche Mahlzeiten im Personalrestaurant und zahlreiche Getränke. descriptionByLocale.fr: Superviseur Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonnelle / Saisonnier. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. - Oui. C'est ce que tu déménages avec nous. Proliférez-vous avec des processus cristallins, une hygiène impeccable et un travail d'équipe de niveau supérieur de 5 étoiles? Devenez la force motrice de nos expériences culinaires et assurez des opérations impeccables dans le back-of-house. Vos responsabilités : Poste et devoir Planification à travers plusieurs points de vente (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, événements externes) – vous orchestrez des opérations sans heurts de mise en place à la panne. Leadership & Coaching de l'équipe de sélection : séances d'information quotidiennes, normes claires, présence motivante – et lorsque la pression est exercée, vous dirigez en travaillant main dans la main. Hygiène et qualité Assurance au plus haut niveau (conformité HACCP) : inspections, documentation et formation pour garantir des normes sans tache. Lave-vaisselle et gestion de l'équipement : utilisation efficace des installations modernes, des soins et de l'entretien, agissant comme un lien clé entre la cuisine, le service et les événements. Inventory & Cost Control: garder une trace des stocks, des produits chimiques et des consommables; assurer des processus efficaces sans temps d'arrêt. Excellence de l'événement : logistique pour les fonctions à grande échelle, mise en place de stations de retour et gestion rapide des redressements. - Oui. Vous faites l'expérience de l'hospitalité et du gîte de luxe au sein de Stewarding ou Back-of-House – idéalement dans un rôle de supervision ou de gestion adjointe. L'état d'esprit pratique & aperçu: vous prenez des décisions intelligentes, restez calme dans les heures de pointe, et prenez possession. Compétences en leadership et en communication. Une mentalité pratique : proactive, orientée vers la solution et un modèle pour la propreté, l'ordre et l'efficacité. Bonne connaissance de l'hygiène et de la technologie : expertise HACCP, connaissance de la technologie de nettoyage et confiance dans les outils de planification et de bureau. Flexibilité : volonté de travailler en équipe, week-ends et événements de soutien – vous profitez du dynamisme d'une propriété de luxe animée. Langues: portugais ou italien ainsi que l'anglais. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. descriptionByLocale.it:
## Descrizione

Spa Therapist (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Grigioni). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

Le persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione:

## Mansioni

- Versare i nostri ospiti con trattamenti termali professionali come massaggi sportivi, massaggi firma, scrub corpo, avvolge e bagni.
- Con il vostro senso per le esigenze individuali, si consiglia ai nostri ospiti sui servizi spa e prodotti per la cura della pelle di alta qualità.
- Fornire esperienze di benessere indimenticabili attraverso la cura di prima classe e il servizio attento.
- Sostenere il team spa alla reception con la pianificazione degli appuntamenti, assicurando operazioni fluide.
- Utilizzare il tuo flair di vendita per consigliare i prodotti di assistenza domestica adatti, aumentando le entrate termiche.
- Assicurare i più elevati standard di igiene e sicurezza in tutta la zona spa e fitness.

# Requisiti #

- Allenamento completo come massaggiatore o una qualifica paragonabile nel campo spa e benessere.
- Ulteriori certificazioni (ad esempio, massaggio tailandese, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, riflessologia, drenaggio linfatico) sono un vantaggio.
- Idealmente, esperienza in corsi di fitness come yoga o Pilates.
- Esperienza dimostrata nel settore spa, preferibilmente nell'ospitalità di lusso.
- Eccellente capacità di comunicazione in tedesco e inglese e sensibilità ai desideri dei nostri ospiti.
- Flessibilità di lavorare fine settimana, vacanze e eventi speciali come la nostra Spa Notte.

# Cosa #

- Al Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo.
- Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi.
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione

Spa Therapist (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:

## Mansioni

- Pamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.
- With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.
- Provide unforgettable well-being experiences through first-class care and attentive service.
- Support the spa team at the reception with appointment scheduling, ensuring smooth operations.
- Use your sales flair to recommend suitable home care products, boosting spa revenue.
- Ensure the highest hygiene and safety standards throughout the spa and fitness area.

## Requisiti

- Completed training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.
- Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.
- Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.
- Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.
- Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.
- Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa.

## Cosa offriamo

- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success.
- We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Spa-Therapeut (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Arbeitszeit: 100%. Vertrag: 10-monatige Stelle / 10-month contract. Eintritt: 2026-06-01. Menschen auf 1800 Metern über dem Meeresspiegel gestalten das Luxus-Mountain-Travel. Unsere dynamische und internationale Gemeinschaft bietet unseren Gästen intelligentes Luxus für ein unvergessliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxus Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels zu unserem Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt tief inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und so umarmen wir unsere Kultur: unterschwelliger Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam machen wir es möglich. Dies ist Ihre Chance, Teil unserer prägenden Kultur zu werden: ## Aufgaben - Verköstigen Sie unsere Gäste mit professionellen Spa-Behandlungen wie Sportmassagen, Signaturmassagen, Körper-Scrubs, Wraps und Bädern. - Mit Ihrem Gespür für individuelle Bedürfnisse beraten Sie unsere Gäste zu Spa-Diensten und hochwertigen Hautpflegeprodukten. - Bereiten Sie unvergessliche Wohlfühl-Erlebnisse durch erstklassige Pflege und aufmerksamen Service. - Unterstützen Sie das Spa-Team an der Rezeption bei der Terminplanung, um einen reibungslosen Betrieb zu gewährleisten. - Nutzen Sie Ihr Verkaufstalent, um geeignete Home-Care-Produkte zu empfehlen und den Spa-Umsatz zu steigern. - Stellen Sie die höchsten Hygiene- und Sicherheitsstandards im Spa- und Fitnessbereich sicher. ## Anforderungen - Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Massagetrainer oder vergleichbare Qualifikation im Bereich Spa und Wellness. - Zusätzliche Zertifizierungen (z. B. Thai-Massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, Reflexologie, Lymphdrainage) sind ein Vorteil. - Idealweise Erfahrung in Fitness-Kursen wie Yoga oder Pilates. - Nachweisliche Erfahrung im Spa-Bereich, bevorzugt in Luxus-Hotellerie. - Exzellente Kommunikation in Deutsch und Englisch und Empathie für die Wünsche unserer Gäste. - Flexibilität, um an Wochenenden, Feiertagen und besonderen Veranstaltungen wie unserer Night Spa zu arbeiten. ## Was wir bieten - Bei Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herz unseres Erfolgs. - Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Mahlzeiten im Mitarbeiter-Restaurant und zahlreiche Vorteile.

descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
Reservations Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Kulm Hotel), St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:

## Mansioni
- Competently handle reservations for individual and group guests as the first point of contact, ensuring the highest level of professionalism and proactive attention to detail
- Maintain and update guest databases with the utmost accuracy, contributing significantly to guest satisfaction and loyalty
- Address and resolve guest complaints promptly and with sensitivity, always finding the most suitable solution in a discreet and efficient manner
- Manage multichannel communication, responding to all incoming enquiries by phone and email
- Coordinate with other departments to ensure optimal alignment between room and event occupancy and our F&B and Spa offerings
- Support the Reservations Manager with administrative tasks, ensure adherence to our high standards, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our products

## Requisiti
- Charisma and friendliness with a natural warmth and refined manners, combined with a keen sense for the needs of discerning guests
- Team spirit and flexibility, with excellent communication skills and the ability to adapt in a dynamic work environment
- Experience in luxury hospitality, with completed vocational training and at least two years of experience in a 5-star hotel in Front Office or Reservations
- Strong language skills in German and English (written and spoken); additional languages such as Italian are an advantage
- Technical proficiency in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook, as well as experience managing online booking channels
- Exceptional organisational skills and customer focus, ensuring precise planning, discreet guest relations, and outstanding service delivery

## Cosa offriamo
- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Â Mansioni - Küchenunterstützung: Sie helfen aktiv bei der Vorbereitungsarbeit (Miss-en-Ort), wie dem professionellen Schneiden von Gemüse und anderen Vorbereitungsaufgaben. - Ordnung und Sauberkeit: Sie sorgen für eine einwandfreie Sauberkeit und Organisation in unserer modernen Küche sowie im Hinterbüro des Capricorn Restaurant. - Pflegende Handhabung: Sie sind verantwortlich für die präzise Reinigung, Pflege und Lagerung von Porzellan, Glaswaren, Besteck und Küchenutensilien (Köpfe und Pfannen). - Koordination und Organisation: Sie arbeiten eng mit den Küchen- und Serviceteams zusammen, um einen reibungslosen Betrieb zu gewährleisten – auch während der geschäftigen Spitzenzeiten. Requisiti - Professional Experience: Sie bringen solide Erfahrungen aus der Gastronomie, ideal aus einer 4- oder 5-Sterne-Hotelumgebung. - Interesse an Culinary Arts: Sie genießen den Umgang mit frischen Zutaten und sind glücklich, das Team mit Lebensmittelzubereitung zu unterstützen. - Sprachkenntnisse: Sie kommunizieren zuversichtlich auf Deutsch, Englisch oder Italienisch. - Persönlichkeit: Sie zeichnen sich durch Flexibilität und die Fähigkeit aus, in einem Team gut zu arbeiten. descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Office Employee/Steward - Staff Restaurant "Capricorne" (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hôtel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonnelle / Saisonnier. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-10. Les gens à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de façonnage : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous : Nous recherchons un soutien énergique pour notre restaurant moderne, Capricorne, qui a été construit il y a un peu moins d'un an. Vous êtes au cœur de nos opérations en coulisses, assurant non seulement une propreté impeccable, mais aussi un soutien actif à notre équipe de cuisine avec des préparations culinaires. ## Mansioni - Kitchen Support: Vous participez activement aux travaux de préparation (mise en place), comme la coupe professionnelle de légumes et d'autres tâches préparatoires. - Ordre et propreté: Vous assurez une propreté et une organisation parfaites dans notre cuisine moderne ainsi que dans le bureau arrière du restaurant Capricorne. - Manipulation soignée : Vous êtes responsable du nettoyage, de l'entretien et du stockage précis de la porcelaine, de la verrerie, des couverts et des ustensiles de cuisine (pots et casseroles). - Coordination et organisation : Vous travaillez en étroite collaboration avec les équipes de cuisine et de service pour assurer un bon fonctionnement, même pendant les heures de pointe. ## Requisiti - Expérience professionnelle: Vous apportez une expérience solide du secteur de la gastronomie, idéalement d'un environnement hôtelier 4 ou 5 étoiles. - Intérêt pour les arts culinaires: Vous aimez manipuler des ingrédients frais et êtes heureux de soutenir l'équipe avec la préparation des aliments. - Compétences linguistiques: Vous communiquez avec confiance en allemand, anglais ou italien. - Personnalité : Vous êtes caractérisé par la flexibilité et la capacité de bien travailler en équipe. Vous appréciez un environnement dynamique et aimez travailler au sein d'une équipe motivée. ## Cosa offriamo - Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages.

And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:

- Cleanliness and Organization: You will ensure impeccable cleanliness and order in our high-end kitchen and the restaurant's back office.

- Coordination and Organization: Ensure smooth operations through efficient organization and coordination of daily tasks.
- Start: immediate

## Requisiti
- Hospitality Experience: You bring solid experience from the hospitality industry, ideally in a high-demand environment.
- Language Skills: German or English or Italian
- Flexibility and Team Spirit: Your ability to adapt to changing requirements and work effectively within a dynamic team is a key strength.
- Start: per immediate wanted, until ca. 06.04.

## Cosa offriamo
- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success.
- We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Maître de Rang (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Grigioni). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01. Eleva la tua carriera a nuove altezze a 1800 metri sul livello del mare e diventare parte della famiglia Kulm Group. Sei pronto a ridefinire l'esperienza di viaggio di montagna di lusso? Unisciti al nostro team dinamico e internazionale di Kulm Group, dove insieme forniamo ai nostri ospiti un'esperienza di lusso unica e creiamo ricordi indimenticabili. ## Perché Kulm Group? - L'eccellenza è al centro di tutto quello che facciamo. Ci sforziamo ogni giorno per raggiungere il meglio e deliziare i nostri ospiti e dipendenti. - Team Passionato: Lavorare in un team vivace e internazionale che si sostiene e si ispira. Esperienza vera camaraderie e spirito di squadra con noi. - Opportunità di carriera: Sbloccare il vostro potenziale e crescere con noi. Siamo impegnati nel vostro sviluppo personale e professionale. - Cultura unica: immergetevi in un ambiente di lavoro che valorizza creatività, passione e autenticità. Qui, è possibile portare le vostre idee alla vita e fare un impatto reale. Fate parte di qualcosa di straordinario! ## Le tue mansioni - Gestisci con fiducia la tua sezione, assicurando un servizio senza interruzioni con un sorriso e attenzione ai dettagli. - No. Coordinate il vostro team, delegate i compiti e garantite un'esecuzione impeccabile. - No. Sei un vero ospite a cuore, consigliando i nostri ospiti internazionali sul menu e abbinamenti di vino. - No. Si occupa di compiti amministrativi come la pianificazione a turni e la gestione degli ordini con efficienza e struttura. - No. Introduce idee fresche e crea esperienze innovative che lasciano un'impressione duratura. - No. Condividi la tua esperienza con il tuo team, promuovendo continuamente formazione e sviluppo. ## Requisiti - Un'educazione completata nella cena fine e l'esperienza nell'ospitalità di lusso o nella gastronomia di fascia alta. - Esperienza di leadership e la capacità di motivare e ispirare il vostro team all'eccellenza. - Eccezionale capacità di comunicazione ed entusiasmo per lavorare con una clientela internazionale. - Forte capacità organizzative, un elevato senso di qualità e una spinta a fissare nuovi standard. - Flessibilità, resilienza e passione per il servizio eccezionale. - La fluidità in tedesco e in inglese è essenziale; lingue aggiuntive sono un plus. # Cosa# offrendo - A Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. Impostare nuovi standard nella cena fine e diventare parte del nostro team. Attendiamo con ansia la vostra applicazione!
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
Maître de Rang (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01.

Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family. Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.

## Perché Kulm Group?
- Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.
- Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.
- Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.
- Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact. Be part of something extraordinary!

## Le tue mansioni
- You confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.
- You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.
- You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.
- You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.
- You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.
- You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.

## Requisiti
- A completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.
- Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.
- Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.
- Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.
- Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.
- Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.

## Cosa offriamo
- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!

jobs.description:
Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us: At the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us: Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry. Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met. Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time. Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence. Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles. | This is you: Organizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner. Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements. Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you. Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm. Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation. | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Lino Dipendente (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10. Le persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua occasione per essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: | Questo è ciò che vi muovete con noi: al Grand Hotel Kronenhof, apprezziamo la massima qualità – e questo si estende alla nostra biancheria. Dal momento che i nostri tessuti sono puliti presso la lavanderia professionale del nostro hotel partner, il Kulm, stiamo cercando un individuo organizzato per garantire un flusso di lavoro liscio e la garanzia di qualità in loco a Pontresina. ## Mansioni - Logistics Management: Coordinate il flusso giornaliero di lino (olio/pulito) tra il Kronenhof e la lavanderia Kulm. - Controllo qualità: ispeziona la lavanderia in entrata per la pulizia e la completezza, assicurando che i nostri elevati standard sono costantemente soddisfatti. - Gestione dell'inventario: Si organizza il deposito di biancheria da terra, uniformi e lavanderia degli ospiti, assicurando tutti i dipartimenti sono forniti in tempo. - Comunicazione: Lei funge da punto di contatto diretto per il personale di lavanderia presso il Kulm Hotel e gestisce con fiducia i dettagli operativi. - Riparazioni minori: Quando necessario, si prende cura di semplici compiti di cucito o riparazioni a uniformi e tessuti. ## Requisiti - Organizzazione Talent: Si mantiene una panoramica anche con grandi volumi di lavanderia e lavoro in modo strutturato ed efficiente. - Consapevolezza della qualità: Hai un occhio per i tessuti e riconosci subito quando qualcosa non soddisfa i nostri requisiti a 5 stelle. - Affidabilità: la puntualità e la resistenza fisica necessaria per la movimentazione di carrelli lavanderia sono una questione ovviamente per voi. - Team Player: Si comunica in modo amichevole e chiaro – sia internamente con la pulizia e esternamente con colleghi al Kulm. - Competenze linguistiche: La buona conoscenza dell'inglese e del tedesco o dell'italiano è essenziale per il coordinamento e la documentazione. # Cosa# offrendo - A Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. - Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo. - Camere confortevoli. - Pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale. - Numerosi vantaggi.
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us: At the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.

## Mansioni
- Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.
- Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.
- Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.
- Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.
- Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.

## Requisiti
- Organizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.
- Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.
- Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.
- Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.
- Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.

## Cosa offriamo
- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success.
- We offer attractive development opportunities.
- Comfortable accommodations.
- Affordable meals in the staff restaurant.
- Numerous perks.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Bettwäsche Mitarbeiter (Teilzeit 50%) (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-monatiger Vertrag. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10. Die Menschen auf 1800m über dem Meeresspiegel prägen den Luxury Mountain Travel. Unsere dynamische und internationale Gemeinschaft bietet unseren Gästen smart Luxury für ein unnachahmliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels für unseren Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt zutiefst inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und als solche nehmen wir unsere Kultur an: unterschätzter Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam schaffen wir es. Dies ist Ihre Chance, Mitglied unserer formgebenden Kultur zu sein: | Das ist es, was Sie mit uns bewegen: Im Grand Hotel Kronenhof schätzen wir die höchste Qualität – und das geht auf unsere Bettwäsche. Da unsere Textilien in der professionellen Wäscherei unseres Partnerhotels, dem Kulm, gereinigt werden, suchen wir einen organisierten Menschen, um einen reibungslosen Workflow und eine Qualitätssicherung vor Ort in Pontresina zu gewährleisten. Mansioni - Logistics Management: Sie koordinieren den täglichen Leinenfluss zwischen Kronenhof und Kulmwäsche. - Qualitätskontrolle: Sie inspizieren Wäsche für Sauberkeit und Vollständigkeit, um sicherzustellen, dass unsere hohen Standards konsequent erfüllt werden. - Inventory Management: Sie organisieren die Lagerung von Bettwäsche, Uniformen und Gästewäsche, um sicherzustellen, dass alle Abteilungen pünktlich geliefert werden. - Kommunikation: Sie dienen als direkter Ansprechpartner für das Wäscheteam im Kulm Hotel und behandeln operative Details mit Vertrauen. - Kleinere Reparaturen: Bei Bedarf kümmern Sie sich um einfache Nähaufgaben oder Reparaturen an Uniformen und Textilien. Requisiti - Organisationstalent: Sie halten einen Überblick auch mit großen Mengen an Wäsche und Arbeit strukturiert und effizient. - Qualität Bewusstheit: Sie haben ein Auge für Textilien und sofort erkennen, wenn etwas nicht unseren 5-Sterne-Anforderungen entspricht. - Zuverlässigkeit: Die Pünktlichkeit und die für die Handhabung von Wäschewagen erforderliche körperliche Ausdauer sind für Sie selbstverständlich. - Teamplayer: Sie kommunizieren freundlich und klar – sowohl intern mit Housekeeping als auch extern mit Kollegen im Kulm. - Sprachkenntnisse: Gute Englischkenntnisse und Deutsch oder Italienisch sind für die Koordination und Dokumentation unerlässlich. Cosa offriamo - Bei der Kulm-Gruppe sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herz unseres Erfolgs. - Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungschancen. - Bequeme Unterkünfte. - Erschwingliche Mahlzeiten im Personalrestaurant. - Zahlreiche Perks.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Linen Salarié (à temps partiel 50%) (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / Contrat de 10 mois. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10. Les gens à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de façonnage : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous: Au Grand Hôtel Kronenhof, nous apprécions la plus haute qualité – et cela s'étend à notre linge. Puisque nos textiles sont nettoyés à la laverie professionnelle de notre hôtel partenaire, le Kulm, nous sommes à la recherche d'un individu organisé pour assurer un flux de travail fluide et l'assurance de la qualité sur place à Pontresina. ## Mansioni - Logistics Management: Vous coordonnez le flux quotidien de linge (huileux/propre) entre le Kronenhof et la buanderie Kulm. - Contrôle de la qualité : vous inspectez le linge entrant pour en vérifier la propreté et l'exhaustivité, en veillant à ce que nos normes élevées soient respectées. - Gestion des stocks: Vous organisez le rangement du linge de sol, des uniformes et de la lessive des invités, en veillant à ce que tous les départements soient fournis à temps. - Communication : Vous servez de point de contact direct pour l'équipe de blanchisserie de l'hôtel Kulm et traitez les détails opérationnels en toute confiance. - Réparations mineures : Si nécessaire, vous vous occupez de tâches de couture simples ou de réparations aux uniformes et aux textiles. ## Requisiti - Talent organisationnel : Vous maintenez une vue d'ensemble même avec de grands volumes de blanchisserie et de travail d'une manière structurée et efficace. - Conscience de la qualité: Vous avez un œil pour les textiles et reconnaissez immédiatement quand quelque chose ne répond pas à nos exigences 5 étoiles. - Fiabilité : La ponctualité et l'endurance physique nécessaires à la manipulation des chariots à linge sont bien sûr de votre ressort. - Team Player: Vous communiquez de manière amicale et claire – à la fois en interne avec le ménage et en externe avec des collègues du Kulm. - Compétences linguistiques : Une bonne connaissance de l'anglais et de l'allemand ou de l'italien est essentielle pour la coordination et la documentation. ## Cosa offriamo - Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre succès. - Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attrayantes. - Des chambres confortables. - Repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel. - De nombreux avantages.

Administrative Exzellenz: Erstellung von Unternehmensrechnungen und allgemeine Korrespondenz (Angebotsanteil ca. 80–90%). Dies ist SieStiftung: Komplette Hotel- oder Gewerbelehre sowie Berufserfahrung in einer ähnlichen Rolle, ideal in der Luxus-Hospitalierindustrie. Linguistische Exzellenz: Business fließend in Deutsch und Englisch (schriftlich und gesprochen). Italienisch ist ein bedeutender Vermögenswert. IT-Leistungsverhältnis: Vertrautes Handling von MS Office und Hotelsystemen (z.B. Opera Cloud). Persönlichkeit: Sie sind ein organisatorisches Talent mit absoluter Zuverlässigkeit und Diskretion. Sie bleiben ruhig und lösungsorientiert, auch unter hohem Druck. Host Mindset: Sie kommunizieren auf der höchsten Service-Ebene, besitzen ein poised Aussehen, und wenden eine “hands-on” Mentalität, wenn es zählt. Warum die Kulm-Gruppe? Wir bieten Ihnen einen Arbeitsplatz, an dem Tradition auf Innovation trifft. descriptionByLocale.en:
Laundry Employee (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Unloading and loading linen from the appropriate machines (washing machines and dryers)
Sorting dirty linen coming from both hotels
Working with heavy-loading machines
Folding linen
Preparing and storing clean linen according to the standards expected of a 5* luxury hotel
Transporting clean and soiled linen to the Grand Hotel Kronenhof by bus (driving licence, category B required)
Organisation and cleaning of the department

## This is you
Resilience and strong
Basic knowledge of lingerie/laundry
Precision and attention to detail
Must have: Italian and/or English
Nice to have: other languages
Must-Have: Drivers license

## Benefits
At the Kulm Group, our employees are the key to our success. We are renowned for our impeccable service as well as our passion for high-end luxury, winter sports, and haute cuisine. With us, you will not only find the perfect platform to advance your career but also an outstanding employee experience with numerous amenities and benefits.

            Apply now

## Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof

                    50%

            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usAt the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.
This is youOrganizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel

                    100%

            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:

You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%).
This is youFoundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? Any additional languages (German and/or Italian) are a great advantage in our multicultural team.Mindset: You possess excellent time-management skills and stay cool when the heat is on.Spirit: You don't just work in a kitchen; you live for the "Understated Luxury" and the unique life experience that the Engadin offers.Why Kulm Hotel? Puisque nos textiles sont nettoyés à la laverie professionnelle de notre hôtel partenaire, le Kulm, nous sommes à la recherche d'un individu organisé pour assurer un flux de travail fluide et l'assurance de la qualité sur place à Pontresina. Ce que vous accomplissez avec nous:Gestion logistique: Vous coordonnez le flux quotidien de lin (huileux/propre) entre le Kronenhof et la buanderie Kulm. Contrôle de la qualité: Vous inspectez la blanchisserie entrante pour assurer la propreté et l'exhaustivité, assurant que nos normes élevées sont constamment respectées. Gestion des stocks : Vous organisez le rangement du linge de sol, des uniformes et de la lessive des invités, en veillant à ce que tous les départements soient fournis à temps. Communication: Vous servez de point de contact direct pour l'équipe de blanchisserie de l'hôtel Kulm et traitez les détails opérationnels en toute confiance. Réparations mineures : Si nécessaire, vous vous occupez de tâches de couture simples ou de réparations d'uniformes et de textiles. Voici votre Talent organisationnel : Vous maintenez une vue d'ensemble même avec de grands volumes de lessive et travaillez de manière structurée et efficace. Conscience de la qualité : Vous avez un œil pour les textiles et reconnaissez immédiatement quand quelque chose ne répond pas à nos exigences 5 étoiles. Fiabilité : La ponctualité et l'endurance physique nécessaires à la manipulation des chariots à linge sont bien sûr de votre ressort. Joueur d'équipe : Vous communiquez de façon amicale et claire – à la fois en interne avec le personnel de ménage et en externe avec des collègues du Kulm. Compétences linguistiques: Une bonne connaissance de l'anglais et de l'allemand ou de l'italien est essentielle pour la coordination et la documentation. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. ## Assistant en alimentation et boissons (m/p/p) Hôtel Kulm 100 % Les personnes à 1800m au-dessus du niveau de la mer façonnent le voyage de montagne de luxe. En tant que Chef de Partie Gardemanger, vous êtes la pierre angulaire de notre brigade de cuisine. Vous apportez "Smart Luxury" à l'assiette, vous assurant que chaque plat est aussi inspirant que les sommets alpins qui nous entourent. C'est votre étape pour allier artisanat et créativité dans une communauté internationale d'excellence. Votre impact : Propriété de la station : Vous assumez l'entière responsabilité de votre section, la gérant avec autonomie et vous assurant que chaque plaque respecte nos normes 5 étoiles. Leadership culinaire : Vous agissez comme un modèle, incarnez les principes de Kulm et inspirez votre équipe à travers une amélioration continue et une attitude « possible ». Maîtrise opérationnelle : Vous organisez votre espace de travail avec précision chirurgicale et planifiez des activités quotidiennes pour assurer un service impeccable, même pendant les heures de pointe. Quality Guardian: Vous respectez la plus haute réglementation en matière de santé et de sécurité alimentaire (HACCP) en tant que seconde nature, assurant le bien-être de nos invités et collègues. Agilité : Vous êtes prêt à accélérer chaque fois que nécessaire, démontrant une véritable appropriation et fiabilité. Langue: Vous parlez couramment l'anglais. Toute autre langue (allemand et/ou italien) est un grand avantage dans notre équipe multiculturelle. Mindset: Vous possédez d'excellentes compétences en gestion du temps et restez au frais lorsque la chaleur est allumée. Esprit: Vous ne travaillez pas seulement dans une cuisine; vous vivez pour le "Luxury Understated" et l'expérience de vie unique que l'Engadin offre. Pourquoi l'hôtel Kulm ? Faites partie d'une histoire légendaire. Nous offrons un environnement international dynamique où votre contribution est vue et appréciée. De la croissance structurée de carrière aux avantages uniques du Groupe Kulm, nous vous proposons la plateforme pour atteindre votre sommet. descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
Front Office Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Kulm Hotel), St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen.

This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:

This is what you move with us:

Ready for the Kulm Spirit? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Mansioni
- The First Impression: Heartfelt check-in & check-out, professional rooming, and competent guest support throughout their entire stay.
- Service Excellence: Active contribution to a smooth daily front office operation according to the high standards of "The Leading Hotels of the World" (LHW).
- Coordination: Handling and processing reservations via Protel, as well as reliable cash management.
- Communication: Confident handling of guest inquiries and complaint management with tact and diplomacy.

## Requisiti
- Foundation: Completed vocational training in the hotel industry and (initial) professional experience at the front office of a luxury or upscale hotel.
- Languages: Fluent in German and English. Additional languages are a welcome asset.
- IT Skills: Proficient in using Opera Cloud and MS Office.
- Personality: You stand out through your well-groomed appearance, a resilient nature, and a genuine passion for the art of service.

## Cosa offriamo
- Why the Kulm? We offer you a workplace in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Look forward to a motivated team, attractive benefits within the Kulm Group, and the opportunity to gain valuable experience in a tradition-rich environment.
- Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.description:
Food and Beverage Director (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-01.

In this newly created key position, you will actively shape the culinary direction of our property as the strategic driving force behind our Food & Beverage concepts. In this role, you will design the future of our F&B world — visionary, bold, and with the ambition to take excellence to the next level. What makes this role unique: Leadership at eye level: You lead a team of seven experienced department heads and approximately 70 employees — with clarity, inspiration, and a genuine talent for developing people. Concept architect & innovator: You evaluate existing concepts, develop new ideas, identify F&B trends and deliberately leverage them. You think on the next level and create experiences that excite our guests. Strategy meets profitability: Budgeting, forecasting, margin optimization — your decisions are data-driven while always keeping the guest experience at the forefront. Operational excellence: You establish quality standards, simplify processes, implement new tools, and modernize systems. For you, efficiency is a result of strong leadership. Connector & multiplier: You act as a strategic partner to General Management, Culinary, Marketing, Sales, and Events — with foresight, professionalism, and outstanding communication skills. Creating experiences rather than just planning them: From wine tastings and pop-up concepts to signature events — you curate memorable moments that stay with our guests long after their stay. | This is you: Completed training in hospitality or gastronomy – ideally complemented by further education in management. Several years of leadership experience in the F&B department of a luxury hotel. Excellent command of German and English; Italian is an advantage. Entrepreneurial mindset, strong affinity with numbers, and a sharp sense for quality. Hands-on mentality, diplomatic skills, and a confident presence in every situation. Are you ready to set new culinary standards and work with a passionate team at the highest level? Then we look forward to receiving your application. | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Questa è la tua occasione di essere un membro della nostra cultura in formazione: | Questo è ciò che ti muove con noi: Lusso. Ambitioso. Visionario. In questa nuova posizione chiave, darai forma attivamente alla direzione culinaria della nostra proprietà come forza strategica trainante dietro i nostri concetti di Food & Beverage. In questo ruolo, designerai il futuro del nostro mondo F&B — visionario, audace e con l'ambizione di portare l'eccellenza al livello successivo. Cosa rende questo ruolo unico: Leadership a livello degli occhi: Guidi un team di sette esperti capi dipartimento e circa 70 dipendenti — con chiarezza, ispirazione e un talento genuino per lo sviluppo delle persone. Architetto dei concetti e innovatore: Valuti i concetti esistenti, sviluppi nuove idee, identifichi le tendenze F&B e le sfrutti deliberatamente. Pensi al livello successivo e crei esperienze che eccitano i nostri ospiti. Strategia incontra redditività: Budgeting, previsioni, ottimizzazione dei margini — le tue decisioni sono basate su dati, mantenendo sempre l'esperienza dell'ospite al primo posto. Eccellenza operativa: Stabilisci standard di qualità, semplifichi i processi, implementi nuovi strumenti e modernizzi i sistemi. Per te, l'efficienza è il risultato di una leadership forte. Connettore e moltiplicatore: Agisci come partner strategico con la Direzione Generale, la Cucina, il Marketing, le Vendite e gli Eventi — con visione, professionalità e straordinarie capacità di comunicazione. Creare esperienze piuttosto che solo pianificarle: Dalle degustazioni di vino e dai concetti pop-up agli eventi di firma — curi momenti memorabili che rimangono con i nostri ospiti molto dopo il loro soggiorno. | Questo sei tu: Formazione completata in hospitality o gastronomia — idealmente completata da ulteriori studi in management. Diversi anni di esperienza di leadership nel dipartimento F&B di un hotel di lusso. Eccellente padronanza della lingua tedesca e inglese; l'italiano è un vantaggio. Mindset imprenditoriale, forte affinità con i numeri e un senso acuto per la qualità. Mentality hands-on, abilità diplomatiche e presenza sicura in ogni situazione. Sei pronto a impostare nuovi standard culinari e lavorare con un team appassionato al più alto livello? Allora ci aspettiamo con piacere di ricevere la tua candidatura. | Benefici: Nel Gruppo Kulm, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo opportunità di sviluppo attraenti, alloggi comfort, pasti a prezzi accessibili nel ristorante per il personale e numerosi vantaggi.

Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us: Luxurious. Ambitious. Visionary. In this newly created key position, you will actively shape the culinary direction of our property as the strategic driving force behind our Food & Beverage concepts. In this role, you will design the future of our F&B world — visionary, bold, and with the ambition to take excellence to the next level. What makes this role unique: Leadership at eye level: You lead a team of seven experienced department heads and approximately 70 employees — with clarity, inspiration, and a genuine talent for developing people. Concept architect & innovator: You evaluate existing concepts, develop new ideas, identify F&B trends and deliberately leverage them. You think on the next level and create experiences that excite our guests. Strategy meets profitability: Budgeting, forecasting, margin optimization — your decisions are data-driven while always keeping the guest experience at the forefront. Operational excellence: You establish quality standards, simplify processes, implement new tools, and modernize systems. For you, efficiency is a result of strong leadership.
